scope: structured change plans only; no source bodies, prompts, model prose, or credentials retained
notes: Each strict miss named the correct cleanup function, return shape, active-session behavior, stable registry ID requirement, test update, and verification command.
The strict scorer withheld credit when a plan preserved the stable ID without repeating its full literal value. That measurement remains visible and was not weakened into a passing automated score.
This judgment accepts context acquisition and plan correctness; it does not claim that source changes were executed in the provider harness.
